response.justification: Despite extensive software experience, the candidate lacks relevant Java proficiency for this junior role, has only basic German (a hard requirement), and holds senior-level titles inconsistent with entry-level expectations, raising concerns about role alignment and language competency.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience across multiple languages and platforms
Strong open-source contributions and technical leadership in diverse projects
Demonstrated expertise in agile practices, CI/CD, and test-driven development
concerns: German language skills are only basic, but fluency is a required qualification
Overqualified with senior titles and 10+ years of experience, mismatched for entry-level role
Java experience is listed among skills but not demonstrated in professional work history
